valueProps.heading: Balık ve Deniz Ürünleri
valueProps.description: Somon, sardalya, karides ve kalamar — omega-3 açısından zengin protein kaynakları, keto makrolarınıza mükemmel uyar.

sampleMeals.name: Zeytinyağlı Izgara Levrek
sampleMeals.description: Taze otlar ve limonla ızgaralanan levrek, roka salatası ve zeytinyağı ile servis edilir.

sampleMeals.name: Yunan Salatası (Keto Versiyonu)
sampleMeals.description: Domates, salatalık, zeytin, beyaz peynir ve bol zeytinyağı ile — ekmek ve tahıl olmadan.

sampleMeals.name: Avokado ve Prosciutto Tabağı
sampleMeals.description: Olgun avokado dilimleri, ince dilim prosciutto, zeytinler ve taze mozzarella ile antipasti tabağı.

sampleMeals.name: Sarımsaklı Karides Sote
sampleMeals.description: Zeytinyağında bol sarımsak ve pul biberle sote edilen karides, buharda ıspanak ile servis edilir.

sampleMeals.name: Badem Unlu Fırın Tavuk
sampleMeals.description: Badem unu ve Akdeniz baharatlarıyla kaplanıp fırınlanan tavuk göğsü, kavrulmuş kabak ile servis edilir.

faqs.question: Keto ve Akdeniz diyeti birleştirilebilir mi?
faqs.answer: Evet. Akdeniz diyetinin zeytinyağı, balık, kuruyemiş ve sebze odağı, ketonun yüksek yağ-düşük karbonhidrat gereksinimleriyle mükemmel uyum sağlar. Tahıllar, baklagiller ve meyveler çıkarılırken Akdeniz'in sağlıklı yağları korunur.

faqs.question: Bu kombinasyon normal ketodan daha mı sağlıklı?
faqs.answer: Potansiyel olarak evet. Standart keto bazen aşırı doymuş yağ ve işlenmiş ete yönelebilir. Akdeniz tarzı keto, zeytinyağı ve balık gibi tekli doymamış ve omega-3 yağlarına odaklanarak kalp sağlığını daha iyi destekler.

faqs.question: Hangi Akdeniz yemekleri keto uyumlu?
faqs.answer: Izgara balık, Yunan salatası (krutonsuz), zeytinyağlı sebzeler, avokado tabakları, deniz ürünleri ve peynir tabaklarının çoğu doğal olarak keto uyumludur.

faqs.question: Bu planda pirinç ve makarna var mı?
faqs.answer: Hayır. Pirinç, makarna, ekmek ve baklagiller karbonhidrat içerikleri nedeniyle hariç tutulur. Bunların yerine kabak noodle, karnabahar pirinç ve bol yeşillik kullanılır.

keto-asian.title: Haftalık Keto Asya Yemek Planları
keto-asian.metaDescription: Wok yemekleri, çorbalar ve ızgara etlerle haftalık keto Asya yemek planları. Pirinç veya noodle yok — tüm umami, karbonhidrat yok.
keto-asian.h1: Keto Asya Yemek Planları — Tüm Umami, Pirinç Yok
keto-asian.intro: Asya mutfağını keto diyetiyle birleştirmek ilk bakışta zor görünebilir — pirinç ve noodle her yemekte var gibidir. Ama gerçek şu ki, Asya mutfağının baharatları, sosları ve pişirme teknikleri tamamen keto uyumlu. Pirinç yerine karnabahar pirinç, noodle yerine shirataki kullanarak otantik Asya lezzetlerini düşük karbonhidratlı versiyonlara dönüştürüyoruz.

valueProps.heading: Akıllı Karbonhidrat Takasları
valueProps.description: Karnabahar pirinç, shirataki noodle ve marul sarmalar — pirinç ve noodle'ın yerini alan zekice alternatifler.

valueProps.heading: Umami Doğal Olarak Keto
valueProps.description: Soya sosu, susam yağı, zencefil ve sarımsak sıfır karbonhidrattır — Asya lezzetlerinin temeli zaten keto uyumlu.

valueProps.heading: Wok Tekniği Mükemmel
valueProps.description: Yüksek ateşte hızlı sote, et ve sebzelerin mükemmel pişmesini sağlar — keto yemekleri için ideal bir teknik.

sampleMeals.name: Teriyaki Somon ve Karnabahar Pirinç
sampleMeals.description: Şekersiz teriyaki soslu ızgara somon, karnabahar pirinç ve buharda brokoli ile servis edilir.

sampleMeals.name: Tay Fesleğenli Tavuk (Marul Sarma)
sampleMeals.description: Kıyılmış tavuk, Tay fesleğeni, sarımsak ve biberlerle wok'ta pişirilip marul yapraklarına sarılır.

sampleMeals.name: Çin Usulü Brokoli ve Dana Sote
sampleMeals.description: İnce dilim dana ve brokoli, soya-zencefil-sarımsak sosunda wok'ta hızlıca sote edilir.

sampleMeals.name: Kore Bulgogi Marul Sarmalar
sampleMeals.description: Marine edilmiş ince dilim dana, tereyağı maruluna sarılıp kimchi ve susam ile servis edilir.

sampleMeals.name: Hindistan Cevizi Sütlü Köri
sampleMeals.description: Tavuk veya karides, hindistan cevizi sütünde köri baharatlarıyla pişirilip karnabahar pirinç ile servis edilir.

faqs.question: Asya yemekleri keto uyumlu mu?
faqs.answer: Soslar ve baharatlar açısından evet. Pirinç ve noodle hariç tutulup alternatiflerle değiştirildiğinde çoğu Asya yemeği mükemmel keto yemeğine dönüşür.

faqs.question: Soya sosu keto mu?
faqs.answer: Evet. Normal soya sosu porsiyon başına 1g'den az karbonhidrat içerir ve keto diyetine uygundur. Tamari de mükemmel bir seçenektir.

faqs.question: Shirataki noodle nedir?
faqs.answer: Konjac bitkisinden yapılan neredeyse sıfır kalorili ve sıfır karbonhidratlı noodle'dır. Dokusu normal noodle'a benzer ve sosları iyi emer. Keto Asya yemeklerinde pirinç noodle'ın mükemmel alternatifidir.

faqs.question: Pirinç yerine ne kullanabilirim?
faqs.answer: Karnabahar pirinç en popüler alternatiftir — rendelenmiş karnabahar kısa süre kavrularak pirinç benzeri bir doku elde edilir. Porsiyon başına sadece 3-5g karbonhidrat içerir.

keto-mexican.title: Haftalık Keto Meksika Yemek Planları
keto-mexican.metaDescription: Tortilla veya fasulye olmadan haftalık keto Meksika yemek planları. Fajita, carne asada ve guacamole günde 30g karbonun altında.
keto-mexican.h1: Keto Meksika Yemek Planları — Cesur Lezzetler, Tortilla Gerekmez
keto-mexican.intro: Meksika mutfağı ve keto diyeti ilk bakışta çelişir gibi görünebilir — tortilla, fasulye ve pirinç karbonhidrat yüklüdür. Ama aslında Meksika mutfağının ruhu — acı biberler, taze salsa, guacamole, ızgara et ve peynir — tamamen keto uyumludur. Tortilla yerine marul sarma, pirinç yerine karnabahar kullanarak lezzetli keto Meksika yemekleri hazırlıyoruz.

valueProps.heading: Salsa ve Guacamole Keto'dur
valueProps.description: Taze salsa, guacamole, sıcak sos ve baharatlı etler — Meksika lezzetlerinin temeli zaten sıfır veya çok düşük karbonhidrattır.

valueProps.heading: Akıllı Tortilla Alternatifleri
valueProps.description: Marul sarma, peynir kabukları ve badem unlu tortilla — tortilla ihtiyacınızı karşılayan zekice keto çözümleri.

valueProps.heading: Protein Zengini
valueProps.description: Carne asada, carnitas, ızgara tavuk ve chorizo — Meksika protein kaynakları doğal olarak keto uyumlu ve son derece lezzetli.

sampleMeals.name: Keto Taco Marul Sarma
sampleMeals.description: Baharatlı kıyma, cheddar peyniri, salsa, ekşi krema ve avokado ile marul yapraklarına sarılır.

sampleMeals.name: Fajita Kasesi (Pirinçsiz)
sampleMeals.description: Izgara tavuk ve biber şeritleri, guacamole, ekşi krema ve peynir ile karnabahar pirinç üzerinde servis edilir.

sampleMeals.name: Chorizo ve Yumurta Kahvaltısı
sampleMeals.description: Çıtır chorizo ile karıştırılmış yumurta, avokado dilimleri ve salsa ile servis edilir.

sampleMeals.name: Carne Asada ve Guacamole
sampleMeals.description: Marine edilmiş ızgara biftek dilimleri, bol guacamole, kavrulmuş biberler ve lime ile servis edilir.

sampleMeals.name: Peynir Kabuğu Quesadilla
sampleMeals.description: Kızgın tavada eritilerek çıtır kabuk haline gelen peynir arasına tavuk, biber ve soğan doldurulur.

faqs.question: Meksika yemekleri keto uyumlu mu?
faqs.answer: Tortilla, fasulye ve pirinç hariç tutulduğunda evet. Ízgara etler, salsa, guacamole, peynir ve ekşi krema düşük karbonhidratlıdır. Birkaç akıllı takasla Meksika lezzetlerinin tadını çıkarabilirsiniz.

faqs.question: Tortilla yerine ne kullanabilirim?
faqs.answer: Marul yaprakları, badem unlu tortilla veya peynir kabukları en iyi alternatiflerdir. Marul sarma en basit ve en düşük karbonhidratlı seçenektir.

faqs.question: Fasulye keto mu?
faqs.answer: Hayır. Siyah fasulye ve pinto fasulye porsiyon başına 20g+ karbonhidrat içerir ve keto diyetine uygun değildir. Alternatif olarak siyah soya fasulyesi veya edamame kullanabilirsiniz.

faqs.question: Guacamole keto mu?
faqs.answer: Evet. Avokado keto diyetinin en iyi gıdalarından biridir — yüksek sağlıklı yağ, düşük karbonhidrat. 100g avokado sadece 2g net karbonhidrat içerir.

vegetarian-italian.title: Vejetaryen İtalyan Yemek Planları
vegetarian-italian.metaDescription: Makarna, risotto ve caprese ile haftalık vejetaryen İtalyan yemek planları. Etsiz klasik İtalyan ev yemekleri, sizin için planlandı.
vegetarian-italian.h1: Vejetaryen İtalyan Yemek Planları — La Dolce Vita, Etsiz
vegetarian-italian.intro: İtalyan vejetaryen mutfağı, etten vazgeçmenin hiç ödün gerektirmediği bir dünyaya açılır. Patlıcan parmigiana, cacio e pepe, risotto ai funghi ve caprese salatası — İtalya'nın en sevilen yemeklerinin birçoğu zaten etsiz harikadır. Her hafta taze malzemeler, İtalyan peynirleri ve aromatik otlarla dolu bir vejetaryen İtalyan planı oluşturuyoruz.

valueProps.heading: İtalya'nın Vejetaryen Mirası
valueProps.description: İtalyan mutfağının önemli bir bölümü zaten vejetaryendir — peynir, yumurta, sebze ve baklagillere dayanan yüzlerce geleneksel tarif mevcuttur.

valueProps.heading: Peynir Çeşitliliği
valueProps.description: Parmesan, mozzarella, ricotta, pecorino ve burrata — İtalyan peynirleri vejetaryen yemeklere inanılmaz derinlik ve doyuruculuk katar.

valueProps.heading: Mevsimsel Taze Malzemeler
valueProps.description: Domates, patlıcan, kabak, enginar ve mantar — İtalyan vejetaryen yemekleri mevsimlik sebzelerin en iyi halini kullanır.

sampleMeals.name: Patlıcan Parmigiana
sampleMeals.description: Fırında kızartılmış patlıcan dilimleri, domates sosu, mozzarella ve parmesan ile katmanlanıp fırınlanır.

sampleMeals.name: Cacio e Pepe
sampleMeals.description: Pecorino Romano ve taze çekilmiş karabiber ile hazırlanan klasik Roma makarnası — sadece üç malzeme.

sampleMeals.name: Mantar Risottosu
sampleMeals.description: Porcini ve karışık mantarla hazırlanan kremalı arborio pirinç risottosu, tereyağı ve parmesan ile bitirilir.

sampleMeals.name: Margherita Pizza
sampleMeals.description: İnce hamur üzerine San Marzano domates sosu, taze mozzarella ve fesleğen — İtalyan pizza sanatının özü.

sampleMeals.name: Minestrone Çorbası
sampleMeals.description: Fasulye, kabak, havuç, kereviz ve küçük makarna ile hazırlanan besleyici İtalyan sebze çorbası.

faqs.question: İtalyan mutfağı vejetaryenler için uygun mu?
faqs.answer: Mükemmel şekilde. İtalyan mutfağı dünyanın en zengin vejetaryen yemek geleneklerinden birine sahiptir. Makarna, risotto, pizza, sebze yemekleri ve baklagiller — et olmadan bile sofranız çok çeşitli ve doyurucu olur.

faqs.question: Parmesan vejetaryen mi?
faqs.answer: Geleneksel Parmigiano-Reggiano, hayvansal peynir mayası içerdiği için teknik olarak vejetaryen değildir. Bitkisel peynir mayasıyla yapılmış İtalyan sert peynirleri vejetaryen alternatif olarak kullanılabilir.

faqs.question: Vejetaryen İtalyan yemekleri yeterli protein sağlar mı?
faqs.answer: Evet. İtalyan peynirleri (parmesan, mozzarella, ricotta), yumurta, baklagiller (cannellini, borlotti) ve tam tahıllı makarna protein açısından zengin kaynaklardır.

faqs.question: İtalyan vejetaryen yemekleri kolay mı?
faqs.answer: Çoğu evet. Cacio e pepe üç malzemeyle, caprese salatası hiç pişirmeden hazırlanır. İtalyan mutfağının güzelliği kaliteli malzemelerin basitçe kullanılmasında yatar.

vegetarian-indian.title: Vejetaryen Hint Yemek Planları
vegetarian-indian.metaDescription: Paneer, dal ve sebze körileriyle haftalık vejetaryen Hint yemek planları. Tüm hafta için planlanan otantik Hint tarifleri, et gerekmez.
vegetarian-indian.h1: Vejetaryen Hint Yemek Planları — Yüzyıllık Bir Gelenek
vegetarian-indian.intro: Hint vejetaryen mutfağı, dünyanın en eski ve en zengin etsiz yemek geleneğidir. Hindistan nüfusunun büyük bir kısmı vejetaryen beslenir ve bu gelenek binlerce yıllık lezzet birikimiyle sonuçlanmıştır. Paneer, dal, chana, aloo gobi ve sonsuz sebze yemekleri — Hint vejetaryen mutfağı hiçbir şeyden eksik bırakmaz.

valueProps.heading: Binlerce Yıllık Gelenek
valueProps.description: Hint vejetaryen mutfağı bir akım değil, binlerce yıllık bir kültürel mirastır — lezzet açısından dünyanın en sofistike etsiz yemek geleneği.

valueProps.heading: Paneer Çeşitliliği
valueProps.description: Palak paneer, paneer tikka, mattar paneer — ev yapımı paneer, Hint vejetaryen yemeklerinin yıldız protein kaynağıdır.

valueProps.heading: Baharat Ustalığı
valueProps.description: Doğru baharat kombinasyonlarıyla basit mercimek veya nohut bile olağanüstü lezzetli yemeklere dönüşür — et hiç aranmaz.

sampleMeals.name: Palak Paneer
sampleMeals.description: Taze ıspanak püresi içinde altın rengi kızartılmış paneer küpleri, sarımsak, zencefil ve baharatlarla tatlandırılır.

sampleMeals.name: Malai Kofta
sampleMeals.description: Patates ve paneer köfteleri, kremalı domates-fındık sosunda servis edilir — Hint mutfağının vejetaryen ziyafet yemeği.

sampleMeals.name: Aloo Gobi
sampleMeals.description: Patates ve karnabahar, zerdeçal, kimyon ve kişnişle sote edilip taze kişniş yaprağıyla süslenir.

sampleMeals.name: Dal Tadka
sampleMeals.description: Sarı mercimek, taze tadka (kızgın yağda hardal tohumu, kimyon ve kuru biber) ile tatlandırılıp pirinç veya roti ile servis edilir.

sampleMeals.name: Pav Bhaji
sampleMeals.description: Ezilmiş karışık sebzeler, bol tereyağı ve baharat karışımıyla pişirilip kızarmış ekmek ile servis edilen Mumbai sokak yemeği.

faqs.question: Hint vejetaryen yemekleri yeterli protein sağlar mı?
faqs.answer: Kesinlikle. Paneer, dal (mercimek), nohut, yoğurt ve süt zengin protein kaynağıdır. Tipik bir Hint vejetaryen öğünde dal + pirinç + yoğurt kombinasyonu tüm temel amino asitleri karşılar.

faqs.question: Paneer nedir ve nasıl yapılır?
faqs.answer: Paneer, sütün limon suyu veya sirke ile kestirilmesiyle yapılan taze peynirdir. Evde kolayca hazırlanabilir — süt kaynatılır, limon suyu eklenir, pıhtılaşan kısım süzülür ve preslenir.

faqs.question: Hint vejetaryen yemekleri acı mı?
faqs.answer: Baharat açısından zengin ama acılık tamamen ayarlanabilir. Birçok Hint vejetaryen yemek (malai kofta, shahi paneer) kremalı ve hafiftir. Biber miktarını azaltarak acıyı kontrol edebilirsiniz.

faqs.question: Hint mutfağında kaç vejetaryen yemek var?
faqs.answer: Yüzlerce. Hindistan'ın her bölgesinin kendine has vejetaryen tarifleri vardır — Güney'in dosa ve idli'si, Kuzey'in paneer yemekleri, Batı'nın dhokla'sı, Doğu'nun mishti doi'si. Bir ömür yetmez.

vegetarian-mediterranean.title: Vejetaryen Akdeniz Yemek Planları
vegetarian-mediterranean.metaDescription: Beyaz peynir, humus, tahıl kaseler ve közlenmiş sebzelerle haftalık vejetaryen Akdeniz yemek planları. Etsiz kalp dostu beslenme.
vegetarian-mediterranean.h1: Vejetaryen Akdeniz Yemek Planları — Taze, Basit, Doyurucu
vegetarian-mediterranean.intro: The Mediterranean diet already puts vegetables, grains, and legumes at its center — removing meat just brings those ingredients further into the spotlight. Our vegetarian Mediterranean plans pair eggs, cheese, and yogurt with the olive oil, fresh herbs, and seasonal produce that define this world-renowned eating style.

valueProps.heading: Eggs and Cheese Add Richness
valueProps.description: Feta, halloumi, ricotta, and eggs provide satisfying protein and flavor that keep vegetarian Mediterranean meals from feeling light on substance.

valueProps.heading: Grain Bowls and Salads That Fill You Up
valueProps.description: Farro, quinoa, bulgur, and freekeh make hearty bases that keep you full, paired with roasted vegetables and tangy dressings.

valueProps.heading: Heart-Healthy by Design
valueProps.description: The Mediterranean eating pattern is the most-studied diet for cardiovascular health, and the vegetarian version amplifies those benefits.

sampleMeals.name: Spanakopita (Greek Spinach Pie)
sampleMeals.description: Flaky phyllo dough filled with spinach, feta, dill, and scallions, baked until golden and crispy.

sampleMeals.name: Shakshuka with Crusty Bread
sampleMeals.description: Eggs poached in a spiced tomato and pepper sauce with cumin, paprika, and a crumble of feta, served with sourdough.

sampleMeals.name: Grilled Halloumi and Roasted Vegetable Platter
sampleMeals.description: Slabs of grilled halloumi alongside roasted eggplant, zucchini, bell peppers, and cherry tomatoes with a lemon-herb drizzle.

sampleMeals.name: Freekeh Tabbouleh with Pomegranate
sampleMeals.description: Smoky freekeh mixed with parsley, mint, tomato, cucumber, and pomegranate seeds in a lemon-olive oil dressing.

sampleMeals.name: Stuffed Grape Leaves with Rice and Herbs
sampleMeals.description: Tender grape leaves rolled around seasoned rice with dill, mint, and pine nuts, braised in olive oil and lemon juice.

faqs.question: Is the Mediterranean diet good for vegetarians?
faqs.answer: It is one of the best diets for vegetarians. The Mediterranean eating pattern is already plant-forward, with vegetables, legumes, grains, and olive oil at its core. Adding eggs and dairy provides complete protein without relying on meat or processed substitutes.

faqs.question: What do vegetarian Mediterranean meals look like for a week?
faqs.answer: A typical week includes shakshuka for breakfast, grain bowls and salads for lunch, and dishes like spanakopita, stuffed peppers, or risotto for dinner. Snacks are hummus with vegetables, olives, nuts, and fresh fruit.

faqs.question: Can I lose weight on a vegetarian Mediterranean diet?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Mediterranean diet is associated with sustainable weight management. The emphasis on fiber-rich vegetables, whole grains, and healthy fats promotes satiety. Removing meat naturally reduces calorie-dense options.

faqs.question: How is vegetarian Mediterranean different from vegan Mediterranean?
faqs.answer: Vegetarian Mediterranean includes eggs, cheese (feta, halloumi, ricotta), yogurt, and honey. Vegan Mediterranean excludes all animal products. The vegetarian version is easier to follow for most people due to the added protein and flavor from dairy and eggs.

gluten-free-asian.title: Glutensiz Asya Yemek Planları
gluten-free-asian.metaDescription: Pirinç bazlı yemekler, wok yemekleri ve çorbalarla haftalık glutensiz Asya yemek planları. Soya sosu tuzaklarını ve gizli gluteni güvenle atlatın.
gluten-free-asian.h1: Glutensiz Asya Yemek Planları — Gizli Gluteni Profesyonelce Atlatın
gluten-free-asian.intro: Asian cuisine offers incredible variety for gluten-free eaters — rice is the default starch in most of Asia, and many dishes are naturally wheat-free. The tricky part is soy sauce (which contains wheat), some noodles, and hidden thickeners. Our gluten-free Asian plans handle all of that, so you can enjoy bold Asian flavors without the worry.

valueProps.heading: Soy Sauce Solved
valueProps.description: Every recipe uses tamari or coconut aminos instead of regular soy sauce, so you get the umami without any wheat.

valueProps.heading: Rice-Based by Default
valueProps.description: Most Asian cuisines center on rice, rice noodles, or rice paper — all naturally gluten-free. We lean into this advantage.

valueProps.heading: Hidden Gluten Flagged
valueProps.description: We call out and replace hidden gluten sources like oyster sauce, hoisin, and wheat-based dumpling wrappers.

sampleMeals.name: Chicken Pad See Ew with Rice Noodles
sampleMeals.description: Wide rice noodles stir-fried with chicken, Chinese broccoli, egg, and a sweet-savory tamari-based sauce.

sampleMeals.name: Vietnamese Pho with Beef
sampleMeals.description: Rich beef bone broth ladled over rice noodles with thinly sliced beef, bean sprouts, Thai basil, and lime.

sampleMeals.name: Japanese Onigiri (Rice Balls)
sampleMeals.description: Seasoned sushi rice shaped into triangles, filled with salmon and wrapped in nori, with tamari for dipping.

sampleMeals.name: Korean Bibimbap
sampleMeals.description: Rice bowl topped with seasoned vegetables, a fried egg, beef, and gochujang (verified gluten-free), mixed tableside.

sampleMeals.name: Thai Green Papaya Salad (Som Tum)
sampleMeals.description: Shredded green papaya pounded with tomatoes, green beans, peanuts, lime, chili, and a tamari-based dressing.

faqs.question: Is Asian food gluten-free?
faqs.answer: Many Asian dishes are naturally gluten-free since rice (not wheat) is the primary starch across most of Asia. However, soy sauce contains wheat, and many sauces, noodles, and coatings use wheat flour. The key is knowing what to swap and what to avoid.

faqs.question: Is soy sauce gluten-free?
faqs.answer: Regular soy sauce (like Kikkoman) contains wheat and is not gluten-free. Tamari is a Japanese soy sauce traditionally made without wheat — always check the label for 'gluten-free' certification. Coconut aminos are another safe alternative.

faqs.question: What Asian noodles are gluten-free?
faqs.answer: Rice noodles (pad thai, pho, rice vermicelli), glass noodles (mung bean), shirataki noodles (konjac), and sweet potato noodles (japchae) are all gluten-free. Avoid ramen, udon, soba (unless 100% buckwheat), and egg noodles.

faqs.question: Can I eat sushi if I am gluten-free?
faqs.answer: Yes, with precautions. Sushi rice, fish, and nori are gluten-free. Use tamari instead of soy sauce, avoid tempura rolls, and ask about imitation crab (which often contains wheat). Sashimi is the safest option.

gluten-free-italian.title: Glutensiz İtalyan Yemek Planları
gluten-free-italian.metaDescription: Glutensiz makarna, risotto ve polenta ile haftalık glutensiz İtalyan yemek planları. Buğdaysız İtalyan lezzetlerinin keyfini çıkarın.
gluten-free-italian.h1: Glutensiz İtalyan Yemek Planları — Evet, Hâlâ Makarna Yiyebilirsiniz
gluten-free-italian.intro: Italian food and gluten seem inseparable — until you discover risotto, polenta, GF pasta, and the countless Italian dishes that never needed wheat in the first place. Our gluten-free Italian plans prove you can eat like you are in Rome without a single grain of wheat touching your plate.

valueProps.heading: GF Pasta That Actually Works
valueProps.description: We use top-quality rice, corn, and legume-based pastas that hold their shape and sauce — no mushy disappointments.

valueProps.heading: Risotto and Polenta Are Your Friends
valueProps.description: Two of Italy's greatest comfort foods are naturally gluten-free. We feature them heavily so you never feel limited.

valueProps.heading: Beyond Pasta Substitutes
valueProps.description: Many iconic Italian dishes — osso buco, chicken cacciatore, caprese — never needed wheat. We highlight these hidden gems.

sampleMeals.name: GF Penne with Roasted Tomato and Basil Sauce
sampleMeals.description: Brown rice penne tossed with slow-roasted cherry tomatoes, garlic, fresh basil, and a glug of extra virgin olive oil.

sampleMeals.name: Creamy Polenta with Mushroom Ragu
sampleMeals.description: Soft, buttery polenta topped with a slow-simmered mushroom and tomato ragu with rosemary and thyme.

sampleMeals.name: Italian Egg Muffins with Sun-Dried Tomato
sampleMeals.description: Baked egg cups with sun-dried tomatoes, mozzarella, and fresh basil — portable and perfectly Italian.

sampleMeals.name: Caprese Salad with Burrata
sampleMeals.description: Creamy burrata over heirloom tomatoes with fresh basil, flaky salt, cracked pepper, and aged balsamic.

sampleMeals.name: Chicken Piccata with Lemon-Caper Sauce
sampleMeals.description: Pan-seared chicken cutlets dredged in rice flour, finished with a bright lemon, butter, and caper pan sauce.

faqs.question: Can you eat Italian food if you are gluten-free?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. While pasta and bread are Italian staples, the cuisine also offers risotto, polenta, grilled meats, seafood, salads, and vegetable dishes that are naturally gluten-free. Plus, high-quality GF pasta has gotten remarkably good.

faqs.question: What is the best gluten-free pasta for Italian recipes?
faqs.answer: Brown rice pasta and corn-rice blends hold up best. Brands like Jovial, Barilla GF, and Banza (chickpea) are widely available. The key is cooking al dente and rinsing briefly — overcooking is the main reason GF pasta turns mushy.

faqs.question: Is risotto gluten-free?
faqs.answer: Yes. Risotto is made with arborio or carnaroli rice, broth, butter, and parmesan — all naturally gluten-free. Just ensure your broth is GF (some commercial broths contain wheat-based additives).

faqs.question: Is Italian bread available gluten-free?
faqs.answer: GF focaccia and ciabatta are available from specialty bakeries and can be made at home with rice flour and tapioca starch. They are not identical to wheat bread but pair well with soups, salads, and dipping oils.

gluten-free-mexican.title: Glutensiz Meksika Yemek Planları
gluten-free-mexican.metaDescription: Mısır tortilla, taco ve taze salsalarla haftalık glutensiz Meksika yemek planları. Doğal olarak buğdaysız otantik Meksika lezzetleri.
gluten-free-mexican.h1: Glutensiz Meksika Yemek Planları — Mısır Kraldır
gluten-free-mexican.intro: Here is the good news: traditional Mexican cuisine is built on corn, not wheat. Corn tortillas, tamales, tostadas, and sopes are all naturally gluten-free. The pitfalls are flour tortillas, beer-battered items, and some store-bought spice mixes. Our plans stick to authentic corn-based Mexican cooking and flag every hidden gluten source.

valueProps.heading: Corn Tortillas Are the Real Deal
valueProps.description: Authentic Mexican food uses corn masa, not wheat flour. Our plans center on corn tortillas, tostadas, and tamales — the way it was always meant to be.

valueProps.heading: Naturally GF Cuisine
valueProps.description: Rice, beans, grilled meats, salsas, guacamole, and most Mexican staples are inherently wheat-free. Very few swaps needed.

valueProps.heading: Cross-Contamination Awareness
valueProps.description: We flag common sources of hidden gluten in Mexican cooking: flour tortillas at taquerias, beer batters, and packaged seasoning mixes.

sampleMeals.name: Street-Style Corn Tortilla Tacos
sampleMeals.description: Double-stacked corn tortillas with grilled chicken, diced white onion, cilantro, lime, and salsa verde.

sampleMeals.name: Chilaquiles with Fried Eggs
sampleMeals.description: Crispy corn tortilla chips simmered in red salsa, topped with fried eggs, crema, queso fresco, and sliced avocado.

sampleMeals.name: Black Bean and Sweet Potato Enchiladas
sampleMeals.description: Corn tortillas rolled with mashed black beans and roasted sweet potato, covered in enchilada sauce and melted cheese.

sampleMeals.name: Ceviche Tostadas
sampleMeals.description: Crispy corn tostadas topped with lime-cured shrimp, avocado, red onion, cucumber, and serrano chili.

sampleMeals.name: Mexican Rice and Bean Bowl
sampleMeals.description: Cilantro-lime rice with seasoned pinto beans, grilled peppers, corn, pico de gallo, and a drizzle of crema.

faqs.question: Is Mexican food gluten-free?
faqs.answer: Traditional Mexican food is largely gluten-free. Corn tortillas, rice, beans, salsas, and grilled meats are all wheat-free. The main items to avoid are flour tortillas, beer-battered items (like fish tacos with tempura), and some packaged seasonings that contain wheat fillers.

faqs.question: Are corn tortillas always gluten-free?
faqs.answer: Pure corn tortillas made from masa harina and water are gluten-free. However, some commercial brands add wheat flour for flexibility. Always check the label, or buy from a tortilleria that uses 100% corn masa.

faqs.question: Is queso dip gluten-free?
faqs.answer: Homemade queso made from melted cheese is naturally gluten-free. Restaurant and jarred versions sometimes use wheat flour as a thickener. Ask about ingredients or make your own with real cheese, peppers, and a splash of milk.

faqs.question: Can celiacs eat at Mexican restaurants?
faqs.answer: Yes, with caution. Stick to corn tortilla dishes, grilled meats, rice, beans, and fresh salsas. Ask about shared fryers (flour tortillas may be fried in the same oil) and confirm that no flour thickeners are used in sauces.

halal-mediterranean.title: Helal Akdeniz Yemek Planları
halal-mediterranean.metaDescription: Izgara etler, humus ve taze salatalarla haftalık helal Akdeniz yemek planları. Akdeniz kıyısından ilham alan helal sertifikalı tarifler.
halal-mediterranean.h1: Helal Akdeniz Yemek Planları — Levant'tan Sofranıza
halal-mediterranean.intro: Mediterranean and halal cooking share deep roots — much of the eastern Mediterranean coast is historically Muslim, and dishes like shawarma, fattoush, and kibbeh are both Mediterranean and halal by nature. Our plans bring together the best of both worlds: heart-healthy Mediterranean eating with strict halal compliance.

valueProps.heading: Naturally Halal Overlap
valueProps.description: Levantine, Turkish, and North African cuisines are simultaneously Mediterranean and halal — no awkward substitutions needed.

valueProps.heading: No Alcohol in Cooking
valueProps.description: We replace wine-based sauces and deglazing with pomegranate molasses, vinegar, and citrus for the same depth of flavor.

valueProps.heading: Halal Meat Done Right
valueProps.description: Our recipes specify cuts and preparation methods that work with halal butcher shops, including proper marination times for tougher cuts.

sampleMeals.name: Chicken Shawarma Plate
sampleMeals.description: Thinly sliced halal chicken shawarma with garlic sauce, pickled turnips, hummus, and warm pita bread.

sampleMeals.name: Lamb Kofta with Tabbouleh
sampleMeals.description: Grilled halal lamb kofta skewers seasoned with cumin and parsley, served alongside fresh parsley-bulgur tabbouleh.

sampleMeals.description: Slow-cooked fava beans mashed with olive oil, lemon, cumin, and garlic, topped with a boiled egg and served with flatbread.

sampleMeals.name: Grilled Sea Bass with Chermoula
sampleMeals.description: Whole grilled sea bass marinated in a North African chermoula of cilantro, cumin, paprika, lemon, and olive oil.

sampleMeals.name: Fattoush Salad with Sumac Dressing
sampleMeals.description: Crispy pita chips tossed with romaine, tomatoes, radishes, cucumber, and mint in a tangy sumac-lemon dressing.

faqs.question: Is Mediterranean food halal?
faqs.answer: Much of it naturally is. Eastern Mediterranean cuisines (Lebanese, Turkish, Egyptian, Moroccan) are traditionally halal. Western Mediterranean food (Italian, French, Spanish) may include pork and alcohol in cooking, which need to be substituted.

faqs.question: What replaces wine in halal Mediterranean cooking?
faqs.answer: Pomegranate molasses, red grape juice, balsamic vinegar, and lemon juice are excellent substitutes. For deglazing pans, chicken broth with a splash of vinegar works perfectly.

faqs.question: Where do I find halal meat for Mediterranean recipes?
faqs.answer: Halal butcher shops, many Middle Eastern grocery stores, and online halal meat delivery services carry the cuts you need. Lamb, chicken, and beef are most common. Look for halal certification labels.

faqs.question: Is hummus halal?
faqs.answer: Yes. Hummus is made from chickpeas, tahini, olive oil, lemon, and garlic — all plant-based and inherently halal. It is a staple in halal Mediterranean eating.

halal-indian.title: Haftalık Helal Hint Yemek Planları
halal-indian.metaDescription: Biriyanı, tereyağlı tavuk ve kebaplarla haftalık helal Hint yemek planları. Her tarifte helal sertifikalı etle otantik Hint lezzetleri.
halal-indian.h1: Helal Hint Yemek Planları — Babür Ziyafetleri, Günlük Kolaylık
halal-indian.intro: India has one of the world's largest Muslim populations, and its halal culinary tradition is extraordinary — from Lucknowi biryani to Hyderabadi haleem, from Mughlai kebabs to Kerala fish curry. Our halal Indian meal plans draw from these rich traditions, using halal meat and avoiding alcohol-based ingredients entirely.

valueProps.heading: Mughlai and Hyderabadi Specialties
valueProps.description: Rich biryanis, creamy kormas, and charcoal-grilled kebabs from India's most celebrated halal cooking traditions.

valueProps.heading: Halal Meat, Indian Spices
valueProps.description: Every recipe is built for halal-certified chicken, lamb, goat, and beef, with marinades and spice blends that maximize flavor.

valueProps.heading: No Alcohol, Full Flavor
valueProps.description: Indian cooking rarely uses alcohol anyway, making it one of the easiest cuisines to keep fully halal without any compromises.

sampleMeals.name: Chicken Biryani
sampleMeals.description: Layers of saffron-scented basmati rice and spiced halal chicken, slow-cooked in a sealed pot with fried onions, mint, and whole spices.

sampleMeals.name: Seekh Kebab with Mint Chutney
sampleMeals.description: Grilled halal lamb mince kebabs seasoned with ginger, green chili, and garam masala, served with fresh mint-cilantro chutney.

sampleMeals.name: Haleem (Wheat and Meat Porridge)
sampleMeals.description: Slow-cooked halal beef with cracked wheat, lentils, and aromatic spices, garnished with fried onions, lime, and ginger.

sampleMeals.name: Egg Paratha
sampleMeals.description: Flaky whole wheat flatbread stuffed with spiced scrambled egg, pan-fried until golden, served with yogurt and pickle.

sampleMeals.name: Butter Chicken with Naan
sampleMeals.description: Tandoori-marinated halal chicken pieces in a velvety tomato-cream sauce with fenugreek, served with warm naan.

faqs.question: Is Indian food halal?
faqs.answer: Much of Indian cuisine is naturally halal or vegetarian. Indian Muslim cooking traditions (Mughlai, Hyderabadi, Lucknowi, Malabar) are inherently halal. The key is ensuring meat is halal-certified and avoiding dishes cooked with alcohol (rare in Indian cuisine).

faqs.question: What is the difference between halal Indian and regular Indian food?
faqs.answer: The main difference is the meat sourcing — halal Indian food uses halal-slaughtered meat. Indian cooking rarely uses alcohol or pork, so most spice blends, cooking methods, and vegetable dishes are identical.

faqs.question: Where can I buy halal Indian spices?
faqs.answer: All common Indian spices (cumin, coriander, turmeric, garam masala, etc.) are inherently halal — they are plant-based. You can buy them at any Indian grocery store, spice shop, or online retailer.

faqs.question: Is ghee halal?
faqs.answer: Yes. Ghee is clarified butter made from cow's milk and is halal. It is a staple fat in Indian cooking and is used in both halal and vegetarian Indian traditions.

halal-middle-eastern.title: Helal Orta Doğu Yemek Planları
halal-middle-eastern.metaDescription: Şavarma, mansaf ve meze ile haftalık helal Orta Doğu yemek planları. Geleneksel olarak helal, yoğun haftalar için tasarlanmış otantik Arap mutfağı.
halal-middle-eastern.h1: Helal Orta Doğu Yemek Planları — Gelenek Haftalık Menünüzle Buluşuyor
halal-middle-eastern.intro: Middle Eastern cuisine is halal at its core — these recipes have been passed down through generations of Muslim families across the Levant, Arabian Peninsula, and North Africa. Our meal plans bring that heritage to your kitchen with authentic recipes for shawarma, mansaf, maqluba, and the mezze spreads that make Middle Eastern dining legendary.

valueProps.heading: Halal by Heritage
valueProps.description: Unlike cuisines that need halal adaptation, Middle Eastern food is traditionally prepared halal — these are recipes passed down through Muslim households for centuries.

valueProps.heading: Mezze Culture Built In
valueProps.description: Hummus, baba ganoush, tabbouleh, and labneh give you built-in variety and make entertaining effortless.

valueProps.heading: Weeknight-Friendly Classics
valueProps.description: We streamline traditional recipes that usually take hours into 30-45 minute versions without sacrificing authenticity.

sampleMeals.name: Chicken Mansaf
sampleMeals.description: Halal chicken braised in a tangy jameed (dried yogurt) sauce, served over spiced rice with toasted almonds and pine nuts.

sampleMeals.name: Foul Mudammas with Olive Oil
sampleMeals.description: Mashed fava beans with garlic, lemon juice, cumin, and a generous pour of olive oil, served with warm pita.

sampleMeals.name: Lamb Shawarma Wrap
sampleMeals.description: Thinly sliced halal lamb shawarma in warm pita with tahini, pickled vegetables, tomato, and fresh parsley.

sampleMeals.name: Maqluba (Upside-Down Rice and Chicken)
sampleMeals.description: Layers of spiced halal chicken, fried eggplant, and basmati rice cooked in one pot and dramatically flipped onto a platter.

sampleMeals.name: Fattoush with Grilled Halloumi
sampleMeals.description: Crispy pita chip salad with mixed greens, radishes, sumac dressing, and slabs of grilled halloumi cheese.

faqs.question: Is all Middle Eastern food halal?
faqs.answer: The vast majority of traditional Middle Eastern recipes are halal, as the cuisine developed within Muslim cultures. Pork is not used, and alcohol in cooking is extremely rare. The main consideration is ensuring meat is sourced from a halal-certified supplier.

faqs.question: What meats are used in halal Middle Eastern cooking?
faqs.answer: Lamb, chicken, beef, and goat are the primary meats. Lamb is the most traditional and prized. Seafood is also widely used, especially in coastal regions. All meat should be halal-certified.

faqs.question: What is a typical Middle Eastern meal structure?
faqs.answer: A traditional meal starts with mezze (hummus, baba ganoush, salads, pickles), followed by a main dish of grilled or braised meat with rice, and often ends with fresh fruit, baklava, or knafeh. Tea is served throughout.

faqs.question: Can I meal prep Middle Eastern food?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Hummus, baba ganoush, and dips keep for 5+ days. Rice dishes and stews reheat beautifully. Marinated meats can be prepped days ahead. Mezze-style meals are among the most meal-prep-friendly formats.

pescatarian-japanese.title: Pesketaryen Japon Yemek Planları
pescatarian-japanese.metaDescription: Suşi, miso çorbası ve ızgara balıkla haftalık pesketaryen Japon yemek planları. Deniz ürünleri ve sebze merkezli otantik Japon mutfağı.
pescatarian-japanese.h1: Pesketaryen Japon Yemek Planları — Bir Ada Ulusunun Doğal Diyeti
pescatarian-japanese.intro: Japan is an island nation, and its cuisine reflects that — seafood and vegetables have always been at the heart of Japanese cooking. A pescatarian Japanese diet is barely a restriction at all; it is closer to how most Japanese people actually eat. Our weekly plans cover sushi, ramen, donburi, and izakaya favorites, all centered on fish and plant-based ingredients.

valueProps.heading: Seafood Is the Default
valueProps.description: Japanese cuisine uses more varieties of seafood than almost any other — salmon, tuna, mackerel, shrimp, squid, seaweed, and dozens more.

valueProps.heading: Umami Without Meat
valueProps.description: Dashi (kelp and bonito broth), miso, soy sauce, and fermented foods provide deep umami flavors without any land-animal products.

valueProps.heading: Balanced and Light
valueProps.description: Japanese meals follow the ichiju-sansai structure — one soup, three sides — which naturally creates balanced, portion-controlled eating.

sampleMeals.name: Salmon Donburi (Rice Bowl)
sampleMeals.description: Sushi rice topped with fresh salmon sashimi, avocado, edamame, pickled ginger, and a soy-sesame dressing.

sampleMeals.name: Miso Soup with Tofu and Wakame
sampleMeals.description: Classic dashi-based miso soup with silken tofu, wakame seaweed, and thinly sliced scallions.

sampleMeals.name: Grilled Mackerel (Saba Shioyaki)
sampleMeals.description: Salt-grilled mackerel fillet served with steamed rice, pickled daikon, and a side of blanched spinach with sesame.

sampleMeals.name: Vegetable Tempura with Dipping Sauce
sampleMeals.description: Lightly battered and fried sweet potato, shiso leaf, lotus root, and shrimp served with tentsuyu dipping sauce.

sampleMeals.name: Hand-Rolled Sushi (Temaki)
sampleMeals.description: DIY nori cones filled with sushi rice, fresh tuna, cucumber, avocado, and spicy mayo — fun and interactive.

faqs.question: Is Japanese food good for pescatarians?
faqs.answer: Japanese cuisine is arguably the best cuisine in the world for pescatarians. Seafood is the primary protein, and the traditional diet is built on fish, rice, vegetables, tofu, and fermented foods. Meat-heavy dishes are a relatively modern addition to Japanese cooking.

faqs.question: What Japanese dishes are naturally pescatarian?
faqs.answer: Sushi, sashimi, miso soup, tempura (vegetable and shrimp), donburi with seafood, ramen with seafood broth, edamame, agedashi tofu, and most izakaya small plates. The majority of traditional Japanese food is already pescatarian.

faqs.question: Is dashi broth pescatarian?
faqs.answer: Traditional dashi is made from kombu (kelp) and katsuobushi (dried bonito fish flakes), making it pescatarian but not vegetarian. Kombu-only dashi is available for vegetarians.

faqs.question: How healthy is a pescatarian Japanese diet?
faqs.answer: Extremely healthy. Japan has one of the highest life expectancies in the world, attributed partly to a diet rich in fish, vegetables, fermented foods, and minimal processed ingredients. The combination of omega-3 fatty acids from fish and antioxidants from green tea and vegetables is hard to beat.

pescatarian-mediterranean.title: Pesketaryen Akdeniz Yemek Planları
pescatarian-mediterranean.metaDescription: Izgara balık, deniz ürünlü makarna ve taze salatalarla haftalık pesketaryen Akdeniz yemek planları. Kalp dostu Akdeniz diyeti en iyi haliyle.
pescatarian-mediterranean.h1: Pesketaryen Akdeniz Yemek Planları — Kıyı Halkının Yeme Şekli
pescatarian-mediterranean.intro: The traditional Mediterranean diet was always a pescatarian diet — coastal communities in Greece, Italy, Spain, and North Africa ate fish daily and meat rarely. Our pescatarian Mediterranean plans return to those roots with grilled fish, seafood stews, olive oil, fresh vegetables, and the simple preparations that make this eating style the gold standard for health.

valueProps.heading: The Original Mediterranean Diet
valueProps.description: Before the modern interpretation added chicken and red meat, the Mediterranean diet was fish, vegetables, olive oil, and wine. We return to that original vision.

valueProps.heading: Omega-3 Rich Every Day
valueProps.description: Salmon, sardines, mackerel, and anchovies provide the omega-3 fatty acids that make the Mediterranean diet famous for heart and brain health.

valueProps.heading: Coastal Recipes from Five Countries
valueProps.description: We draw from Greek, Italian, Spanish, Turkish, and Moroccan coastal cooking traditions for maximum variety.

sampleMeals.name: Grilled Branzino with Lemon and Herbs
sampleMeals.description: Whole branzino stuffed with lemon slices, rosemary, and thyme, grilled until the skin is crispy, served with roasted potatoes.

sampleMeals.name: Shrimp and White Bean Stew
sampleMeals.description: Shrimp sauteed with garlic, cherry tomatoes, and cannellini beans in a white wine and olive oil broth with crusty bread.

sampleMeals.name: Greek Yogurt with Honey, Walnuts, and Figs
sampleMeals.description: Thick Greek yogurt drizzled with raw honey, topped with toasted walnuts and sliced fresh figs.

sampleMeals.name: Sardine and Arugula Toast
sampleMeals.description: Whole sardines on toasted sourdough with peppery arugula, shaved parmesan, lemon zest, and a drizzle of olive oil.

sampleMeals.name: Seafood Paella
sampleMeals.description: Saffron-infused rice with shrimp, mussels, calamari, peas, and roasted red peppers, cooked in a wide pan for a crispy socarrat.

faqs.question: Is the Mediterranean diet pescatarian?
faqs.answer: The traditional Mediterranean diet is very close to pescatarian. Coastal populations in Greece, Italy, and Spain historically ate fish several times per week and red meat only a few times per month. The modern version includes more meat, but the original is fish-forward.

faqs.question: What fish is best for a Mediterranean diet?
faqs.answer: Fatty fish like salmon, sardines, mackerel, and anchovies are ideal for their omega-3 content. White fish like branzino, sea bass, and cod are also staples. The key is variety — eating different types of seafood throughout the week.

faqs.question: How much fish should I eat per week on this plan?
faqs.answer: Our plans include fish or seafood 4-5 times per week, with the remaining meals being vegetarian (eggs, cheese, legumes). This aligns with recommendations from cardiologists and the original Mediterranean diet research.

faqs.question: Is canned fish okay for Mediterranean cooking?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Canned sardines, tuna, and anchovies are Mediterranean pantry staples. They are affordable, convenient, and nutritionally equivalent to fresh. Look for fish packed in olive oil for the most authentic flavor.

dairy-free-thai.title: Süt Ürünsüz Tayland Yemek Planları
dairy-free-thai.metaDescription: Köriler, wok yemekleri ve noodle yemekleriyle haftalık süt ürünsüz Tayland yemek planları. Tayland mutfağı doğal olarak süt ürünsüz — biz de öyle tutuyoruz.
dairy-free-thai.h1: Süt Ürünsüz Tayland Yemek Planları — Doğal Olarak Sütsüz, Zahmetsizce Lezzetli
dairy-free-thai.intro: Thai cuisine is one of the most naturally dairy-free cuisines on the planet. Coconut milk replaces cream, fish sauce replaces butter, and the bold flavors of lemongrass, galangal, and chili mean you never miss cheese for a second. Our dairy-free Thai plans require almost zero substitutions — this is how Thai food was always meant to be eaten.

valueProps.heading: Zero Substitutions Needed
valueProps.description: Unlike adapting Western cuisines, Thai food is already dairy-free by tradition. Coconut milk, coconut cream, and oils are the natural fats.

valueProps.heading: Coconut Milk Does Everything
valueProps.description: Curries, soups, desserts, and drinks all use coconut milk as their creamy base — it is more versatile than dairy ever was.

valueProps.heading: Bold Flavors, No Blandness
valueProps.description: Thai cooking relies on aromatics (lemongrass, galangal, kaffir lime), not dairy, for flavor — so removing dairy changes nothing.

sampleMeals.name: Massaman Curry with Potatoes and Peanuts
sampleMeals.description: Rich coconut milk curry with tender chicken, potatoes, onions, and roasted peanuts in a warm spice blend of cinnamon and cardamom.

sampleMeals.name: Pad Thai with Shrimp
sampleMeals.description: Classic rice noodles stir-fried with shrimp, egg, bean sprouts, and crushed peanuts in a tamarind-palm sugar sauce.

sampleMeals.name: Thai Basil Chicken (Pad Krapow Gai)
sampleMeals.description: Ground chicken stir-fried with holy basil, garlic, chilies, and fish sauce, served over jasmine rice with a fried egg.

sampleMeals.name: Congee with Ginger and Scallions
sampleMeals.description: Silky rice porridge slow-cooked with ginger, topped with a soft-boiled egg, crispy shallots, and a splash of soy sauce.

sampleMeals.name: Green Papaya Salad with Dried Shrimp
sampleMeals.description: Crunchy shredded green papaya with dried shrimp, tomatoes, long beans, peanuts, lime, and bird's eye chili.

faqs.question: Is Thai food dairy-free?
faqs.answer: Yes, traditional Thai food is almost entirely dairy-free. Thai cuisine uses coconut milk instead of cream, and butter and cheese are not part of the cooking tradition. The only exception is some modern Thai-fusion restaurants that add butter or cream to sauces.

faqs.question: Does Thai curry contain dairy?
faqs.answer: Authentic Thai curries use coconut milk, not dairy cream. Green, red, yellow, massaman, and panang curries are all made with coconut milk and curry paste. Always check at restaurants, as some Western-adapted versions may add cream.

faqs.question: Is coconut milk a good dairy substitute?
faqs.answer: For Thai cooking, coconut milk is not a substitute — it is the original ingredient. It provides richness, body, and a subtle sweetness that complements Thai spices perfectly. Full-fat coconut milk works best for curries and soups.

faqs.question: What about Thai iced tea — is it dairy-free?
faqs.answer: Traditional Thai iced tea is made with condensed milk or evaporated milk, which contains dairy. For a dairy-free version, use coconut cream or oat milk. Many Thai restaurants now offer dairy-free options if you ask.

dairy-free-mexican.title: Süt Ürünsüz Meksika Yemek Planları
dairy-free-mexican.metaDescription: Taco, salsa ve ızgara etlerle haftalık süt ürünsüz Meksika yemek planları. Peynir, ekşi krema veya tereyağı olmadan cesur Meksika lezzetleri.
dairy-free-mexican.h1: Süt Ürünsüz Meksika Yemek Planları — Tüm Lezzet, Peynir Yok
dairy-free-mexican.intro: Mexican food without cheese sounds like a sacrifice — until you realize that the soul of Mexican cooking lives in chiles, lime, cilantro, cumin, and slow-cooked meats, not in the queso on top. Traditional pre-colonial Mexican cuisine was entirely dairy-free. Our plans return to those roots while keeping all the bold, satisfying flavors you crave.

valueProps.heading: Salsa Is the Real Star
valueProps.description: Fresh salsas, guacamole, and chile sauces provide all the moisture, flavor, and richness that cheese and sour cream usually offer.

valueProps.heading: Pre-Colonial Inspiration
valueProps.description: Before Spanish colonization, Mexican food had no dairy at all. We draw from that indigenous tradition of corn, beans, chiles, and squash.

valueProps.heading: Smart Swaps When You Want Them
valueProps.description: Cashew crema, nutritional yeast, and avocado-based sauces are available when a recipe truly benefits from a creamy element.

sampleMeals.name: Carnitas Tacos with Salsa Verde
sampleMeals.description: Slow-braised pork shoulder pulled into tender shreds, served on corn tortillas with tomatillo salsa verde, onion, and cilantro.

sampleMeals.name: Black Bean and Avocado Tostadas
sampleMeals.description: Crispy corn tostadas spread with mashed black beans, topped with sliced avocado, pickled red onion, and a drizzle of lime crema (cashew-based).

sampleMeals.name: Huevos a la Mexicana
sampleMeals.description: Scrambled eggs with diced tomato, onion, and serrano pepper, served with warm corn tortillas and refried beans (made with oil, not lard).

sampleMeals.name: Pozole Rojo
sampleMeals.description: Traditional hominy soup in a rich ancho and guajillo chile broth with shredded chicken, topped with shredded cabbage, radish, and oregano.

sampleMeals.name: Grilled Fish Tacos with Mango Salsa
sampleMeals.description: Grilled white fish on corn tortillas with fresh mango-habanero salsa, shredded cabbage, and a squeeze of lime.

faqs.question: Can you eat Mexican food without dairy?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Traditional Mexican cuisine predates the introduction of dairy by Spanish colonizers. Corn tortillas, beans, rice, salsas, grilled meats, and guacamole are all naturally dairy-free. Cheese and sour cream are toppings, not foundations.

faqs.question: What replaces sour cream in dairy-free Mexican food?
faqs.answer: Cashew crema (soaked cashews blended with lime and salt) is the best substitute. Avocado also provides the same cooling, creamy contrast. Some people use coconut yogurt, though it adds a slight sweetness.

faqs.question: Are refried beans dairy-free?
faqs.answer: Homemade refried beans made with oil are dairy-free. However, many restaurant and canned versions use lard (which is dairy-free but not vegetarian) or butter. Check labels or make your own with vegetable oil or avocado oil.

faqs.question: Is Mexican cheese easy to replace?
faqs.answer: For dishes where cheese is a topping (tacos, tostadas), simply skip it — the salsa, guacamole, and other toppings carry the flavor. For dishes where cheese is central (quesadillas, queso fundido), cashew-based cheese or nutritional yeast can work, but we prefer to feature naturally dairy-free Mexican dishes instead.

low-carb-southern.title: Düşük Karbonhidratlı Güney Yemek Planları
low-carb-southern.metaDescription: BBQ, karalahana ve ev yemekleriyle haftalık düşük karbonhidratlı Güney yemek planları. Bisküvi ve yulaf lapası olmadan gerçek Güney lezzeti.
low-carb-southern.h1: Düşük Karbonhidratlı Güney Yemek Planları — Karbonhidrat Çöküşü Olmadan Ev Yemeği
low-carb-southern.intro: Southern food is legendary for its bold flavors, generous portions, and warming comfort — but also for its heavy reliance on cornbread, biscuits, grits, and sweet tea. Our low-carb Southern plans keep the soul of Southern cooking intact: slow-smoked meats, braised greens, spice rubs, and cast-iron techniques, while swapping out the starches that weigh you down.

valueProps.heading: Smoke and Spice Do the Work
valueProps.description: Southern BBQ rubs, Cajun seasoning, and slow-cooking methods create incredible flavor that has nothing to do with carbs.

valueProps.heading: Greens Are Already Southern Royalty
valueProps.description: Collard greens, turnip greens, green beans, and okra are low-carb vegetables that are already central to Southern cooking.

valueProps.heading: Cast-Iron Confidence
valueProps.description: Many Southern classics — blackened fish, seared pork chops, skillet chicken — are naturally low-carb when you skip the breading and biscuit side.

sampleMeals.name: Blackened Catfish with Collard Greens
sampleMeals.description: Catfish fillets coated in Cajun spice and seared in a cast-iron skillet, served with slow-braised collard greens and pot liquor.

sampleMeals.name: Pulled Pork Lettuce Wraps
sampleMeals.description: Slow-smoked pulled pork in a sugar-free BBQ sauce, wrapped in butter lettuce with pickled jalapenos and coleslaw (no sugar dressing).

sampleMeals.name: Shrimp and Cauliflower Grits
sampleMeals.description: Classic shrimp and grits reimagined with cauliflower mash standing in for grits, topped with sauteed shrimp, andouille, and a smoky gravy.

sampleMeals.name: Country Breakfast Scramble
sampleMeals.description: Scrambled eggs with crumbled breakfast sausage, bell peppers, onions, and cheddar cheese — all the diner flavor, no toast needed.

sampleMeals.name: Smoked Chicken Thighs with Green Beans
sampleMeals.description: Bone-in chicken thighs rubbed with paprika and garlic, slow-smoked, served with Southern-style green beans simmered with bacon.

faqs.question: Can Southern food be low-carb?
faqs.answer: Yes. The soul of Southern cooking — slow-smoked meats, braised greens, cast-iron seared fish, and bold spice rubs — is already low-carb. The carbs come from sides like cornbread, biscuits, grits, mac and cheese, and sweet tea, which are easy to swap or skip.

faqs.question: What replaces grits in a low-carb Southern diet?
faqs.answer: Cauliflower mash is the most popular swap — when seasoned with butter, salt, and pepper, it has a similar creamy texture. Some people also use riced cauliflower or mashed turnips for a slightly different take.

faqs.question: Is BBQ sauce low-carb?
faqs.answer: Most store-bought BBQ sauce is loaded with sugar — some brands have 15g of sugar per serving. Sugar-free BBQ sauces are available, or you can make your own with tomato paste, vinegar, smoked paprika, and a sugar substitute like erythritol.

faqs.question: What about fried chicken — can it be low-carb?
faqs.answer: Traditional fried chicken uses flour breading, which is high-carb. Low-carb versions use almond flour, pork rind crumbs, or a mix of both for a crunchy coating with minimal carbs. Air frying or pan-frying in avocado oil keeps it crispy.

meal-plan-for-weight-loss.title: Kilo Verme Yemek Planı
meal-plan-for-weight-loss.metaDescription: Dengeli makrolar ve alışveriş listeleriyle kişiselleştirilmiş haftalık kilo verme yemek planı. Sürdürülebilir, doyurucu yemekler otomatik planlanır. Ücretsiz deneyin.
meal-plan-for-weight-loss.h1: Diyet Gibi Hissettirmeyen Kilo Verme Yemek Planı
meal-plan-for-weight-loss.intro: Losing weight shouldn't mean eating bland chicken and steamed broccoli on repeat. The key is calorie-controlled meals that are genuinely satisfying so you never feel deprived. We build you a fresh weight-loss meal plan every week with proper portions, balanced nutrition, and enough variety to keep you motivated through the entire journey.

valueProps.heading: Calorie-smart, not calorie-obsessed
valueProps.description: Every meal is portioned to support a healthy deficit without starving you. We balance protein, fiber, and healthy fats so you stay full between meals.

valueProps.heading: No banned foods
valueProps.description: We don't eliminate entire food groups. Instead, our plans use smart swaps and proper portions so you can enjoy pasta, bread, and even dessert within your goals.

valueProps.heading: Built for real life
valueProps.description: Meals that take 20-40 minutes, use common grocery store ingredients, and taste good enough that the whole household can eat the same dinner.

sampleMeals.name: Greek Yogurt Parfait with Berries & Granola
sampleMeals.description: Thick Greek yogurt layered with mixed berries and a sprinkle of low-sugar granola, delivering 22g protein for under 300 calories.

sampleMeals.name: Turkey Taco Lettuce Wraps
sampleMeals.description: Seasoned ground turkey with black beans, corn, and pico de gallo wrapped in crisp butter lettuce leaves.

sampleMeals.name: Lemon Herb Salmon with Roasted Vegetables

sampleMeals.name: Chicken & Vegetable Stir-Fry

sampleMeals.name: Apple Slices with Almond Butter
sampleMeals.description: Crisp apple slices paired with a tablespoon of almond butter for a satisfying 180-calorie snack with fiber and healthy fats.

faqs.question: How many calories are in the weight loss meal plans?
faqs.answer: Our plans typically range from 1,400 to 1,800 calories per day depending on your preferences and goals. You can set your target calorie range in your profile and we'll adjust portions accordingly. Every plan prioritizes protein and fiber to keep you satiated within your calorie budget.

faqs.question: Will I feel hungry on a weight loss meal plan?
faqs.answer: That's exactly what we design against. Our meals are high in protein, fiber, and volume — big salads, hearty soups, and generous vegetable portions — so you're eating plenty of food even at a calorie deficit. Most users report feeling more satisfied than when they were eating random takeout.

faqs.question: Can I still eat carbs and lose weight?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Carbs aren't the enemy — excess calories are. Our weight loss plans include whole grains, fruits, and starchy vegetables in smart portions. We focus on complex carbs that provide sustained energy rather than cutting them entirely, because restrictive diets don't last.

faqs.question: How fast will I lose weight with this meal plan?
faqs.answer: Healthy, sustainable weight loss is typically 1-2 pounds per week. Our plans are designed for a moderate calorie deficit that preserves muscle mass and energy levels. We focus on building habits you can maintain long-term rather than crash dieting.

meal-plan-for-muscle-gain.title: Kas Yapma Yemek Planı
meal-plan-for-muscle-gain.metaDescription: Kişiselleştirilmiş haftalık yemek planıyla kas yapın. Dengeli makrolar ve alışveriş listeleriyle yüksek proteinli tarifler. Bugün ücretsiz deneyin.
meal-plan-for-muscle-gain.h1: Gerçek Sonuçlar Veren Kas Yapma Yemek Planı
meal-plan-for-muscle-gain.intro: Building muscle requires more than just hitting the gym — you need consistent, protein-rich nutrition to support recovery and growth. The problem is that meal prepping for a bulk is exhausting and repetitive. We generate a fresh high-calorie, high-protein meal plan every week so you can focus on training while we handle the nutrition.

valueProps.heading: Protein at every meal
valueProps.description: Plans are built around 1g of protein per pound of body weight, distributed across meals and snacks so your muscles have a steady supply of amino acids throughout the day.

valueProps.heading: Clean bulk, not dirty bulk
valueProps.description: We prioritize nutrient-dense calories from whole foods — lean meats, complex carbs, and healthy fats — so you gain muscle without excessive fat.

valueProps.heading: Meal prep friendly
valueProps.description: Most meals are designed for batch cooking so you can prep Sunday and eat well all week. Recipes scale easily for multiple servings.

valueProps.heading: Calorie surplus made easy
valueProps.description: Hitting 2,800-3,500 calories of clean food is harder than it sounds. Our plans make it manageable with calorie-dense but nutritious meals and snacks.

sampleMeals.name: Protein Oat Bowl with Banana & Peanut Butter
sampleMeals.description: Oats cooked with whey protein, topped with sliced banana, peanut butter, and a drizzle of honey. 42g protein, 650 calories.

sampleMeals.name: Chicken Burrito Bowl

sampleMeals.name: Beef & Sweet Potato Power Plate
sampleMeals.description: Pan-seared sirloin steak with roasted sweet potato wedges and steamed broccoli drizzled with garlic butter.

sampleMeals.name: Salmon & Quinoa Bowl
sampleMeals.description: Teriyaki-glazed salmon fillet over fluffy quinoa with edamame, cucumber, and pickled ginger.

sampleMeals.name: Cottage Cheese & Trail Mix
sampleMeals.description: Full-fat cottage cheese topped with mixed nuts, seeds, and dried cranberries for a 300-calorie protein-packed snack.

faqs.question: How much protein do I need to build muscle?
faqs.answer: Research suggests 0.7-1g of protein per pound of body weight for muscle growth. Our plans are designed to hit the upper end of that range, distributing protein across 4-5 eating occasions per day for optimal muscle protein synthesis.

faqs.question: Do I need supplements alongside this meal plan?
faqs.answer: Our meal plans are designed to meet your protein and calorie needs through whole foods alone. However, a whey protein shake can be convenient post-workout. Creatine monohydrate is the only supplement with strong evidence for muscle gain and can complement any eating plan.

faqs.question: Can I build muscle on a vegetarian meal plan?
faqs.answer: Yes. We can generate high-protein vegetarian muscle gain plans using eggs, dairy, tofu, tempeh, legumes, and seitan. Set your dietary preferences and we'll adjust the protein sources while keeping the calorie and macro targets the same.

faqs.question: How many calories should I eat to gain muscle?
faqs.answer: A moderate surplus of 300-500 calories above your maintenance level is ideal for lean muscle gain. Our plans typically range from 2,600-3,500 calories depending on your profile. You can adjust your calorie target in preferences.

meal-plan-for-pregnancy.title: Hamilelik Yemek Planı
meal-plan-for-pregnancy.metaDescription: Folat açısından zengin tarifler, dengeli beslenme ve alışveriş listeleriyle hamilelik güvenli haftalık yemek planı. Her trimester için planlandı. Ücretsiz deneyin.
meal-plan-for-pregnancy.h1: Sizi ve Bebeğinizi Besleyen Hamilelik Yemek Planı
meal-plan-for-pregnancy.intro: Eating well during pregnancy matters more than ever, but between cravings, aversions, and fatigue, planning nutritious meals can feel overwhelming. Our pregnancy meal plans are designed with key prenatal nutrients in mind — folate, iron, calcium, omega-3s — while keeping meals appealing even when your appetite is unpredictable.

valueProps.heading: Prenatal nutrition built in
valueProps.description: Every plan emphasizes folate-rich greens, iron from lean meats and legumes, calcium from dairy and fortified foods, and omega-3s from fish and seeds.

valueProps.heading: Nausea-friendly options
valueProps.description: First trimester meals include bland, easy-to-stomach options alongside more adventurous choices so you can pick what works on any given day.

valueProps.heading: Safe ingredients only
valueProps.description: We automatically avoid high-mercury fish, unpasteurized cheeses, and undercooked preparations so you never have to second-guess what's on your plate.

sampleMeals.name: Spinach & Feta Egg Muffins
sampleMeals.description: Baked egg cups loaded with spinach, feta, and sun-dried tomatoes. Rich in folate and protein, easy to grab on busy mornings.

sampleMeals.name: Lentil & Sweet Potato Soup

sampleMeals.name: Herb-Crusted Salmon with Quinoa
sampleMeals.description: Wild-caught salmon baked with a herb crust, served over quinoa with steamed asparagus. Packed with omega-3s and complete protein.

sampleMeals.name: Chicken & Broccoli Pasta
sampleMeals.description: Whole wheat penne with grilled chicken, broccoli florets, and a light garlic-parmesan sauce. Comforting and nutrient-dense.

sampleMeals.name: Greek Yogurt with Walnuts & Honey
sampleMeals.description: Full-fat Greek yogurt topped with crushed walnuts and a drizzle of honey for calcium, protein, and omega-3s.

faqs.question: What foods should I avoid during pregnancy?
faqs.answer: Our pregnancy plans automatically exclude high-mercury fish (swordfish, king mackerel, tilefish), raw or undercooked meats and eggs, unpasteurized dairy, and deli meats unless heated. We only include pregnancy-safe ingredients so you don't have to worry.

faqs.question: How many extra calories do I need while pregnant?
faqs.answer: Generally, no extra calories in the first trimester, about 340 extra in the second, and 450 extra in the third. Our plans adjust based on your trimester and activity level. The focus is on nutrient density rather than just eating more.

faqs.question: Can this meal plan help with morning sickness?
faqs.answer: We include gentle, bland options like crackers with cheese, ginger tea, and simple grain bowls alongside regular meals. On tough days, you can lean on these lighter options. Small, frequent meals often help more than three large ones.

faqs.question: Is this plan safe for gestational diabetes?
faqs.answer: Our standard pregnancy plan can be adjusted for gestational diabetes by selecting low-carb preferences. However, gestational diabetes requires medical supervision — please work with your healthcare provider and use our plans as a helpful starting point, not medical advice.

faqs.question: Do I need prenatal vitamins if I follow this meal plan?
faqs.answer: Yes. While our plans maximize prenatal nutrients through food, a prenatal vitamin is still recommended by healthcare providers to ensure adequate folate, iron, and DHA. Think of our meal plan as the foundation and your prenatal vitamin as the safety net.

meal-plan-for-beginners.title: Yeni Başlayanlar İçin Yemek Planı
meal-plan-for-beginners.metaDescription: Kolay, yeni başlayan dostu tarifler ve haftalık alışveriş listeleriyle yemek planlamaya başlayın. Basit malzemeler, net talimatlar. Ücretsiz deneyin.
meal-plan-for-beginners.h1: Nereden Başlayacağını Bilmeyenler İçin Yemek Planı
meal-plan-for-beginners.intro: If meal planning feels intimidating, you're not alone. Most people fail at it because they try to go from zero to gourmet overnight. Our beginner meal plans use simple techniques, common ingredients, and short prep times so you can build the habit without burning out. Every recipe assumes you're starting from scratch — no chef skills required.

valueProps.heading: 5-ingredient recipes
valueProps.description: Most meals use 5-8 main ingredients you can find at any grocery store. No specialty shops, no obscure spices, no chef-level knife work.

valueProps.heading: Step-by-step simplicity
valueProps.description: Recipes are written for people who don't cook often. Clear instructions, common techniques like baking and sauteing, and realistic prep times.

valueProps.heading: Gradual skill building
valueProps.description: Each week introduces slightly more variety so you naturally expand your cooking skills and comfort zone without feeling overwhelmed.

sampleMeals.name: Scrambled Eggs with Toast & Avocado
sampleMeals.description: Simple scrambled eggs seasoned with salt and pepper, served on whole wheat toast with sliced avocado.

faqs.question: I've never meal planned before — is this really for beginners?
faqs.answer: Yes, genuinely. We built this for people who currently eat takeout most nights or live on cereal and sandwiches. The recipes use basic techniques like boiling pasta, baking chicken, and assembling wraps. If you can follow simple instructions, you can make these meals.

faqs.question: How much time will meal planning save me as a beginner?
faqs.answer: Most beginners spend 30-45 minutes every evening deciding what to eat and running to the store for ingredients. With a weekly plan and grocery list, you do one shop and follow the plan. Most users save 2-3 hours per week from day one.

faqs.question: What kitchen equipment do I need?
faqs.answer: A basic set: one frying pan, one pot, a baking sheet, a cutting board, and a knife. That's enough for 90% of our beginner recipes. We don't require food processors, stand mixers, or specialty tools.

faqs.question: Can I customize the meals if I don't like something?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Set your dietary preferences and dislikes in your profile and we'll avoid those ingredients. You can also regenerate individual meals you're not excited about. The plan adapts to you, not the other way around.

meal-plan-for-picky-eaters.title: Seçici Yiyiciler İçin Yemek Planı
meal-plan-for-picky-eaters.metaDescription: Seçici yiyiciler için tasarlanmış haftalık yemek planı. Tanıdık lezzetler, garip malzeme yok, dengeli beslenme. Kişiselleştirilmiş ve otomatik. Ücretsiz deneyin.
meal-plan-for-picky-eaters.h1: Gerçekten Keyif Alacağınız Seçici Yiyiciler Yemek Planı
meal-plan-for-picky-eaters.intro: Being a picky eater doesn't mean you're doomed to eat chicken nuggets forever. The trick is starting with familiar flavors and gradually expanding your comfort zone. Our picky eater meal plans focus on approachable ingredients, comforting textures, and crowd-pleasing flavors while sneaking in balanced nutrition you won't even notice.

valueProps.heading: Familiar flavors first
valueProps.description: We build plans around foods you already like — pasta, chicken, rice, cheese, potatoes — and prepare them in ways that feel safe but keep things interesting.

valueProps.heading: No surprise ingredients
valueProps.description: Every ingredient is listed clearly. No hidden vegetables, no unfamiliar spices, no textures that catch you off guard. You always know what you're eating.

valueProps.heading: Gentle variety
valueProps.description: We introduce new flavors slowly through familiar formats — a new seasoning on chicken you already love, a different cheese in your usual pasta.

sampleMeals.name: Buttery Cinnamon French Toast
sampleMeals.description: Thick-cut bread dipped in cinnamon-vanilla egg batter and pan-fried until golden. Served with maple syrup.

sampleMeals.description: Classic creamy mac and cheese with pureed butternut squash blended into the sauce for added nutrition without changing the taste.

sampleMeals.name: String Cheese & Crackers
